meta.name: AI Week Library - 4
meta.description: Warm editorial fashion e-commerce UI built around a golden-yellow brand accent (#EBD96B). Page surfaces use a soft cool-gray base (#F4F6F5) with white card backgrounds and light off-white secondary fills. Blue-gray muted tones (#C2C8DA) serve low-emphasis text and pressed states. Typography is strictly black on light and white on dark. A pure-black inverted surface anchors tooltips and filled controls. Elevated cards cast a subtle black shadow (35px blur, 2px Y offset). Status colors pair vivid red (#D50015) with a white error surface and teal-cyan (#5AC4C3) with a white success surface.

chartColors._description: Only 2 chart colors are extractable from the Figma file: golden-yellow and vivid red. These are the actual data-visualization colors present in the design.

backgrounds._description: Cool-gray base surface with white card backgrounds, warm off-white secondary fills, blue-gray low-emphasis states, and a pure black inverted surface.

--em-sem-background.label: Card / widget surface — primary background for chart cards and interactive hover surfaces

--em-sem-background--neutral.label: Page / container surface — default surface for table headers, select dropdowns, loaders

--em-sem-background--light.label: Secondary surface — filled inputs, date range backgrounds, disabled buttons

--em-sem-background--muted.label: Pressed / low-emphasis — select field borders, active button states

--em-sem-background--subtle.label: Hover / soft emphasis — active inputs, toggle-on state, hover buttons

--em-sem-background--inverted.label: Dark / inverted surface — tooltips, filled select triggers, switch off state

textColors._description: Pure black primary text on light surfaces. Neutral/subtle/muted are actual Figma-extractable gray values rather than the blue-gray (#C2C8DA) used as a background muted tone. White for text on the black inverted surface.

--em-sem-text.label: Primary text — titles, labels, values, icons, all primary content

--em-sem-text--muted.label: Secondary text — extracted gray, subtitles, descriptions, axis labels, legends

--em-sem-text--subtle.label: Disabled / low-contrast — extracted gray, disabled states, placeholder text, subtle grid lines

--em-sem-text--neutral.label: Neutral emphasis — extracted near-black, loading indicators, category labels

--em-sem-text--inverted.label: Text on dark surfaces — tooltip titles, selected dropdown items, primary buttons

statusColors._description: Vivid red for errors on a white surface; teal-cyan for success on a white surface — both high-contrast against the page backgrounds.

--em-sem-status-error-text.label: Error text / icon — error messages, negative KPI trend indicators

--em-sem-status-error-background.label: Error surface — background behind error indicators

--em-sem-status-success-text.label: Success text / icon — positive KPI trend indicators

--em-sem-status-success-background.label: Success surface — background behind success indicators

shadows._description: Subtle black shadow with a moderate blur and minimal vertical offset for gently elevated card and dropdown surfaces.

--em-core-shadow-color.label: Shadow color — neutral black at 25% opacity
